turns.text: Hello, thank you for calling DigeeSell! My name is Riya from customer care. How may I help you today?
Main theek hoon, dhanyavaad! Aap kaise hain? Aapko kis tarah ki madad chahiye?
Hello! I’m Riya from DigeeSell customer care — here to help you personally. What can I do for you today?
The caller speaks Hindi or English.
I can understand both Hindi and English, so feel free to speak in whichever language you’re comfortable with! How can I assist you today?
You're welcome! Is there anything specific you’d like to know or discuss?
